title: 8 Exporting Dashboard Data
body_text:
8	Exporting Dashboard Data
8.1	Exporting Dashboard to PowerPoint
To export an image of the Payments Dashboard to PowerPoint:
Select
Export
, then
PowerPoint
on the top menu bar. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Select âExportâ, then âPowerPointâ
To export live data to PowerPoint:
Use the drop-down menu to select
Embed live data
(this is the default selection), then select
Copy
. Paste the URL into your existing PowerPoint presentation. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Embed Live Data
Alternatively, select
Open in PowerPoint
to create a new PowerPoint presentation. See Figure 2 above. Follow the on-screen prompts.
To export an image of the dashboard to PowerPoint:
Use the drop-down menu to select
Export as image
, choose your export options, then select
Export
. The export process may take a few minutes. See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Export Image
A new PowerPoint presentation is generated that includes a title page and an image of the Payments Dashboard. See Figure 4 for a sample.
Figure 4: Payments Dashboard in PowerPoint
8.2 	Exporting Dashboard Data to PDF
To export an image of the Payments Dashboard to PDF:
Select
Export
, then
PDF
on the top menu bar. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Select âExportâ, then âPDFâ
Choose your export options, then select
Export
. The export process may take a few minutes. See Figure 6.
Figure 6: Export Image
View an image of the dashboard as a PDF in your browser, then save or download it using your browserâs functionality. This process may differ depending on your computerâs setting and the browser you use. See Figure 7 for a sample.
Figure 7: View PDF
END
